meta..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() || data.child('hostUid').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('hostUid').val() === data.child('hostUid').val())

$seat..write: auth != null && (newData.child('uid').val() === auth.uid || data.child('uid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms').child($roomId).child('meta/hostUid').val() === auth.uid)

game..write: auth != null && (root.child('rooms').child($roomId).child('players/0/uid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms').child($roomId).child('players/1/uid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms').child($roomId).child('players/2/uid').val() === auth.uid || root.child('rooms').child($roomId).child('players/3/uid').val() === auth.uid)
